releaseNotes: v0.28.5 — a big batch of zone-auditing and workflow improvements from field testing. (1) Bug fixes: a single scan no longer creates two entries after saving an audit; opening one zone inside a group now shows only that zone's medications (a new 'Audit all' button runs the whole group together when you want it). (2) Zone auditing: each zone in a group shows its own red/yellow/green status; drag-and-drop to reorder zones and zones within a group; one shared audit frequency per group; and a live 'scanned this run' list inside an audit (newest on top, tap any row to edit). (3) Workflow: Daily Intake rows are now tappable to edit; the old Cycle Count screen has been removed (the zone audit replaced it). (4) Labels: printing no longer forces a temporary lot/serial for NDC scans, and the default label output is now landscape for 1×2-1/8" DYMO 450 stock. (5) Expiring hub: a custom 'within N days' window plus the option to exclude zones (fridge, narcotics, creams) from the expiring list. Device-to-device sync of the zone lists themselves and the CSU unit-counting workflow are in progress. 573 tests passing.
